passive.name: Prowl
passive.description:
Moving through brush increases Nidalee's Move Speed by 10% for 2 seconds, increased to 30% toward visible enemy champions within 1400 range.

Hitting champions or monsters with Javelin Toss or Bushwhack triggers a Hunt, granting True Sight of them for 4 seconds. During this time, Nidalee gains 10% Move Speed (increased to 30% toward the Hunted target) and her Takedown and Pounce are enhanced against them.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate - Prowl:}} While in {{tip|brush}}, {{ci|Nidalee}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for a short time, increased when facing a nearby enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Hunt:}} Hitting nearby {{tip|monsters}} or enemy champions with ''{{ai|Javelin Toss|Nidalee}}'' or ''{{ai|Bushwhack|Nidalee}}'' will apply a ''Hunted'' mark and {{tip|true sight|reveal}} them for a few seconds. During this time, '''Nidalee''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, increased when facing a ''Hunted'' target.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Nidalee's''' first use of ''{{ai|Takedown|Nidalee}}'' and ''{{ai|Pounce|Nidalee}}'' against ''Hunted'' targets are empowered.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Prowl:}} While in {{tip|brush}}, '''Nidalee''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, increased to {{as|30%|ms}} when facing a {{tt|nearby|1400 range}} {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy {{tip|champion}}, and persisting for 2 seconds after leaving brush.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Hunt:}} Hitting {{tip|monster|monsters}} or enemy champions with ''{{ai|Javelin Toss|Nidalee}}'', or ''{{ai|Bushwhack|Nidalee}}'' while they are {{tt|nearby|3000 range}}, applies a ''Hunted'' mark and {{tip|true sight|reveals}} them for 4 seconds. During this time, '''Nidalee''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, increased to {{as|30%|ms}} when facing a {{tt|nearby|5500 range}} ''Hunted'' target.  Additionally, '''Nidalee's''' first use of ''{{ai|Takedown|Nidalee}}'' and ''{{ai|Pounce|Nidalee}}'' against ''Hunted'' targets are empowered.
wiki_detail.description3: The {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} from ''Prowl'' and ''Hunt'' can stack, but cannot exceed {{as|30%|ms}}.
wiki_detail.notes: * {{ai|Bushwhack|Nidalee}} {{tip|true sight|reveals}} the target for 4 seconds even while '''Nidalee''' is not nearby.

Q.name: Javelin Toss / Takedown
Q.description: In human form, Nidalee throws a spiked javelin at her target that gains damage as it flies.  As a cougar, her next attack will attempt to fatally wound her target, dealing more damage the less life they have.
Q.tooltip: Human Form: Nidalee throws her javelin, dealing {{ humanminimumdamage }} magic damage, increased up to {{ humanmaximumdamage }} magic damage based on distance flown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

W.name: Bushwhack / Pounce
W.description: In human form, Nidalee lays a trap for unwary opponents that, when sprung, damages and reveals its target. As a cougar, she jumps in a direction, dealing damage in an area where she lands.
W.tooltip:
Human Form: Nidalee places an invisible trap for 2 minutes. When an enemy walks over it, they are dealt {{ damagepersecond }} magic damage per second for {{ e3 }} seconds.

{{ maxtraps }} traps may be active at once.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

E.name: Primal Surge / Swipe
E.description: In human form, Nidalee channels the spirit of the cougar to heal her allies and imbue them with Attack Speed for a short duration. As a cougar, she claws in a direction, dealing damage to enemies in front of her.
E.tooltip: Human Form: Nidalee restores {{ totalhealing }} Health increased up to {{ maxhealing }} based on missing Health and grants them {{ bonusas*100 }}% Attack Speed for {{ asduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

R.name: Aspect Of The Cougar
R.description: Nidalee transforms into a cougar, gaining new abilities.
